title: tagetes michauxiana
intro: Tagetes michauxiana, also known as the French marigold or Mexican marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico and Central America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Tagetes michauxiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Tagetes michauxiana can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern medicine to create topical creams, ointments, and gels.
